description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of square-toe franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion. Upper Smooth leather upper with an overlay and a design across the midfoot for absolute comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of use Concealed elasticated gusset on the midfoot below the tongue to offer a snug, customised Fit Leather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfort Leather footbed for absolute all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip on smooth surfaces Raised heel with branding for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
